---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that gitoverit doesn't currently support? What's painful about the current behavior?

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work. If it's a new flag, suggest a name and example invocation:

```bash
gitoverit ~/projects --your-flag
```

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem, and why they're not as good.

## Additional context

Mockups of output, links to similar features in other tools, or related issues.
